summary.narrative: Today's analysis identified increased coordination activity across engineering and product teams. Two critical delivery risks were detected due to unresolved cross-team dependencies and pending design approvals. Additionally, three ongoing discussions in the #bosso-engineering channel suggest potential scope changes that could impact the backend migration timeline. Most development work is progressing as planned, but a few blockers may affect the upcoming sprint commitments if not addressed.
actionPoints: Escalate API dependency because onboarding tasks are blocked.
Review sprint scope because new feature requests increased workload.
Complete design approval because development is waiting.
Confirm client requirements because the project scope is unclear.
Schedule release review because delivery risks are increasing.
Align engineering teams because coordination gaps were detected.
Finalize implementation plan because technical decisions are pending.
Review resource allocation because team capacity is constrained.

incidents.title: Critical tasks blocked by dependencies
incidents.description: Multiple high-priority development tasks that are currently blocked due to unresolved dependencies on the Platform Services team. Engineers have repeatedly discussed the blocker in Slack, while several Jira stories remain in a Blocked state, indicating a growing risk to the current sprint and the planned release timeline.

incidents.title: Engineering Team Waiting for Design Decisions
incidents.description: Development on the onboarding flow is blocked until the design team finalizes sign-off on the remaining screens.

incidents.title: Client Change Requests Impacting Scope
incidents.description: The client has requested additional dashboard functionality that falls outside the originally agreed project scope.

incidents.title: Unresolved Cross-Team Dependencies
incidents.description: Sprint progress is being slowed by an unresolved dependency on the Platform Services team.

incidents.title: Multiple High-Priority Jira Tasks Overdue
incidents.description: Several high-priority tickets have passed their due date, raising risk to the current release timeline.

incidents.title: Engineering Capacity Overloaded
incidents.description: Current sprint workload exceeds available engineering capacity, putting planned commitments at risk.

incidents.title: Documentation Updates Behind Schedule
incidents.description: Technical documentation has fallen behind the current release schedule and needs dedicated time to catch up.

incidents.title: Pending Security Review for New Features
incidents.description: New onboarding features are awaiting a required security review before they can ship.

incidents.title: Design Team Backlog Growing
incidents.description: The design team's review backlog continues to grow, delaying downstream engineering work.

incidents.title: QA Testing Delays Due to Environment Setup
incidents.description: QA testing is delayed while the test environment is reconfigured, pushing back the current test pass.

slack.title: Authentication API Dependency
slack.description: Backend team is waiting for the Platform Services API before onboarding development can continue.
slack.quote: We're still waiting for the authentication API from the Platform team. BOSSO onboarding can't move forward until it's available.

slack.title: API Contract Not Finalized
slack.description: Multiple user stories remain blocked until the API contract is finalized by the Platform team.
slack.quote: Three user stories are blocked because the new API contract hasn't been finalized.

slack.title: Holiday Feature Delivery Risk
slack.description: Engineering team discussed potential delays to the Holiday Lighting feature due to unresolved dependencies.
slack.quote: This dependency is now affecting the Holiday Lighting feature. We may miss the sprint target if it's delayed further.

jira.title: Integrate Authentication API to unblock onboarding flow

email.title: Platform Services API Access Request
email.description: Engineering team requested API access to unblock onboarding development.
email.quote: Hi team, We need API access for the onboarding integration. Please let us know when we can get access. This is blocking multiple dev tasks.

slack.title: Design Sign-off Pending
slack.description: Engineering is blocked waiting on final design approval for the onboarding screens.
slack.quote: Still waiting on design sign-off — dev can't start the onboarding screens without it.

email.title: Design Review Follow-up
email.description: Product manager followed up on the pending design review.
email.quote: Following up on the design review — can we get this signed off today so engineering isn't blocked?

slack.title: Client Requested Scope Addition
slack.description: Client asked for two additional dashboard widgets outside the original scope.
slack.quote: Client just asked for two more widgets on the dashboard — this wasn't in the original scope.

jira.title: Evaluate scope change request from client

slack.title: Blocked on Platform Services Team
slack.description: Cross-team dependency on Platform Services is delaying the current sprint.
slack.quote: We're still blocked on the Platform Services team for this one.

email.title: Overdue Jira Tickets Follow-up
email.description: Reminder sent about several overdue high-priority tickets.
email.quote: These tickets are now overdue — can we get an updated ETA today?

slack.title: Docs Falling Behind Feature Work
slack.description: Documentation updates have slipped behind the current release schedule.
slack.quote: Docs are falling behind again — we should block time for this before the release.

email.title: Documentation Status Check-in
email.description: Check-in email about outstanding documentation tasks.
email.quote: Checking in on the outstanding docs tasks — do we have a revised timeline?

jira.title: Schedule security review for new onboarding features

slack.title: Design Backlog Keeps Growing
slack.description: Design team flagged a growing backlog of unreviewed requests.
slack.quote: Our backlog keeps growing — we need another designer on this project.

jira.title: Environment setup blocking QA test pass
